test_cases.title: Validate Aurora PostgreSQL Database Connection and Data Integrity Post-Migration
steps: Connect to the Aurora PostgreSQL instance configured for the loyalty portal.
Run sample queries to verify schema correctness.
Validate data consistency by comparing key data sets against the legacy database export.
Run transaction tests to ensure database operations succeed without error.
test_cases.expected_result: Database connection is successful, schemas are correct, data is consistent, and transactions complete without errors.

test_cases.title: Verify Automated CI/CD Pipeline Execution and Deployment
steps: Trigger a build in the new CI/CD pipeline.
Validate that code compiles and unit tests are executed.
Ensure successful deployment to the AWS staging environment.
Verify rollback triggers function correctly upon deployment failure.
test_cases.expected_result: CI/CD pipeline completes all stages successfully and deploys the application; rollback executes correctly when triggered.

test_cases.title: End-to-End Flow Test of Customer Loyalty Portal on AWS
steps: Access the loyalty portal via the configured AWS environment URL.
Perform login with a valid customer account.
Simulate earning rewards and redeeming points.
Validate UI response times and backend transaction accuracy.
test_cases.expected_result: Portal functions end-to-end without errors, UI is responsive within SLA, and transactions are recorded correctly.

test_cases.title: Validate Data Migration Scripts for Accuracy and Completeness
steps: Execute the migration scripts on a test dataset.
Compare source and target datasets for completeness and accuracy.
Check for any data transformation errors or losses.
Review audit logs generated during migration.
test_cases.expected_result: Data migration completes without errors, data is accurate and complete, and audit logs confirm all records processed.

test_cases.title: Security Test: Validate Access Controls on AWS Deployed Portal
steps: Attempt unauthorized access to AWS-hosted loyalty portal features.
Test role-based access permissions for various user types.
Verify encryption of data in transit and at rest.
Check logs for unauthorized access attempts.
test_cases.expected_result: Unauthorized access is blocked, roles are enforced correctly, data is encrypted properly, and logs capture all access attempts.

test_cases.title: Performance Test: Measure Portal Scalability and Response under Load
steps: Simulate concurrent users accessing the portal during peak loads.
Monitor response times and resource utilization on AWS infrastructure.
Verify system stability and no degradation in user experience.
Check for any error logs or failures.
test_cases.expected_result: Portal maintains acceptable response times under peak load with stable operation and no errors.
